flags.concern: Step 2 still has no targeted regression test for the route-unlock behavior, so the most subtle part of the change remains unverified by the plan's validation set.
flags.evidence: The repository has no `EditorPaneTab` test file, and Step 5 only runs `LayoutMainContent.test.tsx`, `PanesContext.test.tsx`, `usePaneLockPolicyState.test.ts`, and `useBottomOffset.test.ts`. None of those exercise `src/features/editor/components/EditorPaneTab.tsx` on `/tools/video-editor` with a persisted `editor` lock, so the hydration-safe unlock effect introduced in Step 2 would not get direct coverage.
